name: PreviewCard
description: A hover-triggered card that shows a preview of linked content. Built on Base UI PreviewCard with StyleX styling.

Root.description: Manages hover/focus state and provides context to child parts.

onOpenChange.description: Callback fired when open state changes.

delay.description: Delay in ms before the preview card appears.

closeDelay.description: Delay in ms before the preview card hides.

Trigger.description: The link or element that triggers the preview card on hover.

dataAttributes.data-popup-open: Present when the preview card is open.

Portal.description: Renders preview card content into a React portal.

Positioner.description: Positions the popup relative to the trigger.

sideOffset.description: Offset from the trigger in pixels.

dataAttributes.data-open: Present when the preview card is open.

Arrow.description: An arrow pointing from the popup to the trigger.

intents.reasoning: PreviewCard shows a rich preview of content when hovering over a link or trigger.
PreviewCard is ideal for showing a summary of a user profile when hovering over their name or avatar.

avoidWhen.reasoning: Use Popover for content with buttons, forms, or interactive elements. PreviewCard is for passive previews.
Use NavigationMenu for structured navigation with links and sections.
Use Tooltip for brief, non-interactive labels or descriptions.

examples.name: basic
examples.code:
<PreviewCard.Root>
  <PreviewCard.Trigger href="#">Hover me</PreviewCard.Trigger>
  <PreviewCard.Portal>
    <PreviewCard.Positioner>
      <PreviewCard.Popup>
        A simple preview of the linked content.
      </PreviewCard.Popup>
    </PreviewCard.Positioner>
  </PreviewCard.Portal>
</PreviewCard.Root>

examples.name: with-arrow
examples.code:
<PreviewCard.Root>
  <PreviewCard.Trigger href="#">Link</PreviewCard.Trigger>
  <PreviewCard.Portal>
    <PreviewCard.Positioner sideOffset={8}>
      <PreviewCard.Popup>
        <PreviewCard.Arrow />
        Preview content with arrow.
      </PreviewCard.Popup>
    </PreviewCard.Positioner>
  </PreviewCard.Portal>
</PreviewCard.Root>

examples.name: rich-content
